text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 64 

MDCD_WVR_1115_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Medicaid — 1115 Waiver Type Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the code to indicate the type of 1115 waiver under which the beneficiary received 
Medicaid coverage; most recent in the calendar year. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file 

VALUES: 01 = 1115(a) Other demonstration 
22 = 1115 Pharmacy plus waiver 
24 =1115 Family planning demonstration 
89 =Two
